name: Yeagar
description: Yeagar (イエーガー Iēgā) is a Mage of the Quatro Cerberus Guild.  Yaeger seems to employ plants in battle. Yeagar has proven himself capable of summoning forth large carnivorous plant-like objects from the ground, shattering it in the process. Such seeming flytraps, which consist of four massive "petals", with a row of rounded teeth on their inner sides and massive spikes on their outer ones, are roughly the size of a human, and damage enemies by suddenly closing themselves on them, being shown sending them flying away with brute force.  (Source: Fairy Tail Wiki)
